translations.en: I have to pull the plug out.
translations.ru: Мне нужно вытащить вилку из розетки.
translations.pt: Tenho que tirar o plugue da tomada.
translations.he: אני צריך להוציא את התקע מהשקע.
translations.vi: Tôi phải rút phích cắm ra.
translations.ar: يجب أن أسحب القابس من المقبس.
translations.nl: Ik moet de stekker eruit trekken.
translations.uk: Мені треба витягнути вилку з розетки.
translations.el: Πρέπει να βγάλω το βύσμα από την πρίζα.
translations.ro: Trebuie să scot ștecherul din priză.
translations.ja: コンセントからプラグを抜かなきゃいけない。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun in nominative singular; subject of the finite auxiliary 'muss'.
Modal auxiliary, present indicative (1st person singular); selects the bare infinitive 'ziehen' as its complement to express necessity.
Definite article, accusative masculine singular; determiner of 'Stecker' marking it as the direct object.
Common noun, accusative masculine; direct object (patient) of 'ziehen'.
Infinitive; lexical verb complement of the modal 'muss' (bare infinitive), denoting the action applied to the object.

sentences.target: Wir wollen nächsten Monat nach Leipzig ziehen.
sentences.reading: /viːɐ ˈvɔlən ˈnɛːçstən ˈmoːnaːt naːx ˈlaiptsɪç ˈtsiːən/

translations.de: Wir wollen nächsten Monat nach Leipzig ziehen.
translations.ipa: /viːɐ ˈvɔlən ˈnɛːçstən ˈmoːnaːt naːx ˈlaiptsɪç ˈtsiːən/
translations.en: We want to move to Leipzig next month.
translations.es: Queremos mudarnos a Leipzig el próximo mes.
translations.fr: Nous voulons déménager à Leipzig le mois prochain.
translations.it: Vogliamo trasferirci a Lipsia il mese prossimo.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们下个月想搬到莱比锡。
translations.yue: 我哋下個月想搬去萊比錫。
translations.ru: Мы хотим переехать в Лейпциг в следующем месяце.
translations.pt: Queremos nos mudar para Leipzig no mês que vem.
translations.he: אנחנו רוצים לעבור ללייפציג בחודש הבא.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi muốn chuyển đến Leipzig vào tháng sau.
translations.ar: نريد الانتقال إلى لايبزيغ الشهر القادم.
translations.nl: We willen volgende maand naar Leipzig verhuizen.
translations.uk: Ми хочемо наступного місяця переїхати до Лейпцига.
translations.hi: हम अगले महीने लाइपज़िग में शिफ्ट होना चाहते हैं।
translations.pl: Chcemy w przyszłym miesiącu przeprowadzić się do Lipska.
translations.el: Θέλουμε να μετακομίσουμε στη Λειψία τον επόμενο μήνα.
translations.nb: Vi vil flytte til Leipzig neste måned.
translations.id: Kami ingin pindah ke Leipzig bulan depan.
translations.sv: Vi vill flytta till Leipzig nästa månad.
translations.ro: Vrem să ne mutăm la Leipzig luna viitoare.
translations.cs: Chceme se příští měsíc přestěhovat do Lipska.
translations.da: Vi vil flytte til Leipzig næste måned.
translations.ja: 来月ライプツィヒに引っ越したいです。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun in nominative plural; subject of the finite auxiliary 'wollen'.
Modal auxiliary, present indicative (1st person plural); selects the infinitive 'ziehen' as its complement to express intention.
Attributive adjective, accusative masculine singular; modifies 'Monat' in a temporal accusative phrase.
Common noun, accusative; part of an accusative-of-time adverbial specifying when the action is intended.
Preposition forming a directional prepositional phrase; governs the destination 'Leipzig' (no article with city names).
Proper noun (city name); object of the preposition 'nach', indicating destination.
Infinitive; lexical verb complement of 'wollen'. Here used intransitively as a motion verb meaning to relocate, modified by the directional PP 'nach Leipzig'.

translations.ja: カーテンを引いてもいいよ。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun in nominative singular; subject of the finite auxiliary 'kannst'.
Modal auxiliary, present indicative (2nd person singular); selects the bare infinitive 'ziehen' to express ability.
Definite article, accusative masculine singular; determiner of 'Vorhang' marking it as the direct object.
Common noun, accusative masculine; direct object (patient/theme) of 'ziehen'.
Infinitive; lexical verb complement of the modal 'kannst', transitive here with the object 'den Vorhang'.

sentences.target: Er hilft mir, den Wagen zu ziehen.
sentences.reading: /eːɐ hɪlft miːɐ deːn ˈvaːgən tsuː ˈtsiːən/

translations.de: Er hilft mir, den Wagen zu ziehen.
translations.ipa: /eːɐ hɪlft miːɐ deːn ˈvaːgən tsuː ˈtsiːən/
translations.en: He helps me pull the cart.
translations.es: Él me ayuda a tirar del carrito.
translations.fr: Il m’aide à tirer le chariot.
translations.it: Mi aiuta a tirare il carrello.
translations.ko: 그는 내가 수레를 끄는 것을 도와줘요.
translations.pt: Ele me ajuda a puxar o carrinho.
translations.he: הוא עוזר לי למשוך את העגלה.
translations.vi: Anh ấy giúp tôi kéo chiếc xe đẩy.
translations.nl: Hij helpt me de kar trekken.
translations.hi: वह मुझे ठेला खींचने में मदद करता है।
translations.el: Με βοηθά να τραβήξω το καροτσάκι.
translations.nb: Han hjelper meg å dra vogna.
translations.sv: Han hjälper mig att dra vagnen.
translations.ro: El mă ajută să trag căruciorul.
translations.da: Han hjælper mig med at trække vognen.
translations.ja: 彼は私が台車を引くのを手伝ってくれる。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun in nominative singular; subject of the finite main verb 'hilft'.
Main verb, present indicative (3rd person singular); takes a dative complement 'mir' and a 'zu'-infinitive clause as complement.
Personal pronoun in dative singular; indirect object required by 'helfen' and controller of the understood subject in the 'zu'-infinitive.
Definite article, accusative masculine singular; determiner of 'Wagen' marking it as the direct object of the infinitive.
Common noun, accusative masculine; direct object of the infinitive 'ziehen' within the 'zu'-infinitival clause.
Infinitival particle marking the non-finite verb 'ziehen' in the complement clause.
Infinitive; head of the 'zu'-infinitival complement selected by 'hilft', transitive with object 'den Wagen'.
